name: fluent
description: Fluent helps you plan meals, stay ahead of groceries, log workouts, and make better closet decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Meals, fitness, groceries, kitchen tracking, and a closet-aware stylist.
interface.longDescription: Fluent brings weekly meal planning, grocery prep, workout planning, workout logging, kitchen inventory, and a closet-aware stylist that can actually judge purchases, spot redundancy, and sharpen a wardrobe.
defaultPrompt: Plan next week around my schedule and turn it into a grocery list I can actually shop from.
Plan my workouts for this week and keep them realistic.
Tell me if this clothing purchase is actually right for my wardrobe or just attractive in isolation.
